description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical cup with a slightly flared rim and a smooth, continuous surface. The cup is predominantly black with a subtle greenish tint near the base, giving it a modern and sleek appearance. A single, curved handle is attached to one side, ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior appears to be the same material and color as the exterior, with no visible lining or insulation. The surface is glossy, reflecting light and suggesting a ceramic or glazed finish. There are no visible logos, patterns, or decorative elements, making the design minimalistic and functional.
description: A tall, glossy black cup with a curved handle and a subtle green tint at the base, featuring a minimalistic and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's cylindrical body and rim, with the handle not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved handle attached to the cup, with the greenish tint at the base more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view of the cup, showing a continuous smooth surface with no handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the handle from a different angle, with the glossy finish reflecting light.
